name: stone grotto
hints: A stone grotto with a star and the Dizzy Dean spell. Both are valuable!
GET STAR and GET DIZZY (the Dizzy Dean spell). The spell may disorient enemies or have magical effects.
Take both items. The Dizzy Dean spell is one of several spells needed to solve the castle's puzzles. NORTH leads back through the lava stream.
notes: Stone grotto with a *STAR* and the Dizzy Dean spell. North leads back through the lava stream (room 5). Both items are important - the star is a treasure, the spell is useful against enemies or for puzzle solving.
